title: Plastic Texture Pack - Mod Support
description: Make your worlds simple, colorful, and vibrant for mods?! Cousin to the Bare Bones texture pack.
body:
## <center>Plastic Texture Pack - Mod Support</center>
## <center>Make your worlds simple, colorful, and vibrant for mods?</center></center> 
### <center>Yes, you heard correct! Presented by Cixon, Ren, and NixyNebula, you can now enjoy the Plastic Texture Pack with plenty of popular mods!
